3108880.name: Insula Mystica
3108880.description:
Explore, Survive, Thrive, and Try To Escape From A Sprawling Atmospheric Island

Discover the secrets and mysteries of the island and explore dangerous ancient Temples riddled with traps and hazards!

Fight for survival by foraging the island for sources of food and water, crafting materials, and camp upgrade parts!

Restore your camp on the island, your base of operations! Upgrade various parts of your camp to craft more advanced items, food/drinks recipes, and eventually, a means of escaping the island!

Explore mysterious sci-fi ruins, abandoned research stations, caves, and even underwater to find Blueprints, rare materials, and journal logs detailing what happened to Doctor Kline's research team!

Unlock Advanced Technological Abilities

Collect Artifacts to upgrade your abilities, and uncover the mystery of what happened to Kline's team by finding Audio Logs left behind by the Research team previously sent by CreationTech!

Unlock Technological Abilities to eliminate obstacles and mechanisms, traverse the island and its Temples, and more!
Use the Overload Gauntlet to parry projectiles, blast through barriers, and more!

Quickly zip around the island and its Temples by using the Grapple Beam Ability to fling from one Grapple Pylon to another! Fast Travel the Insula Mystica way!

Reveal Hidden objects with the Revealer Ability to solve light puzzles, unveil collectibles, and discover secret areas hidden throughout the game!
Unlock more abilities by exploring the island and recovering the lost technology that CreationTech wants to use for their own malevolent causes!
Locate Collectible Artifacts scattered around the Island and its Temples!
Use these Artifacts to unlock the Artifact Doors and upgrade your Skills and Abilities!

Discover The Mystery of Doctor Kline's Missing Research Team

You are an unnamed agent of CreationTech sent on a mission to recover Doctor Kline’s research into the mysterious ruins located on a tropical island. A simple extraction of Dr. Kline and his team after radio silence turns into a fight for survival as you battle against traps, mechanisms, and more from a mysterious force on the island. Given only a short brief on your mission to the island, it is up to you to piece together the island’s purpose and what happened to Kline and his team through journal logs and environmental storytelling.
3108880.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
